task_summary: Coffee maker warranty expired recently, so discounted repair is available. Agent must not say there are no warranty options.

task_requirements.requirement: Agent must check warranty status before filing the claim.
Agent must process the warranty claim with resolution discounted_repair.
Agent must make clear that the valid outcome is discounted paid repair, not a free replacement or free repair.
Agent must state that the outcome is discounted paid repair rather than replacement or refund.
Agent must state the customer is responsible for the discounted repair cost before confirming.
Agent must preview the discounted paid repair and obtain explicit user confirmation before finalizing the warranty claim.
Agent must not route the customer to goodwill, live-agent escalation, or an exception request as the resolution.

opening_message: My coffee maker from ORD-7232 broke just after the warranty ended. Is there any help or am I out of luck?

user_simulator.user_sim_context: You are contacting support about order ORD-7232. Coffee maker warranty expired recently, so discounted repair is available. Agent must not say there are no warranty options. Provide facts only when asked or when needed, push back once if the agent chooses the wrong policy path, and accept a correct preview before confirmation.
task_rules: Say it broke just after warranty ended.
Accept the warranty preview if it matches policy.
Ask whether there is any free option before accepting discounted paid repair.
Ask for confirmation that this is not a warranty replacement and not a refund before accepting.
Do not agree to the repair unless the agent previews the paid repair and asks you to confirm before filing it.
